name: streaming_unicode_a7dc_literal
description: U+A7DC literal stream: Root{u: literal "ƛ", note: string}. Same cadence as the enum case; the closed value folds U+A7DC→U+019B and claims the canonical literal ƛ. #555 Slice 2 admits non-ASCII string-literal/enum/field-name shapes into the native STREAM lane (checkStreamRootSupported narrowed): the streaming cadence is character-agnostic (done-required scalars null-fill until complete; partial strings shown) and the complete-value fold routes through the same bamlunicode-backed final coercer, so native reproduces BAML parse-stream byte-exact per prefix. Per-prefix want values are BAML v0.223 parse-stream (BAMLFUZZ_PARSE_CAPTURE=1); native==BAML for the fold is proven by the bamlunicode Rust reference.
